titleZh: Ang Thiam Swee 诉 Low Hian Chor
titleEn: Ang Thiam Swee v. Low Hian Chor
decisionType: 派生诉讼许可与善意标准
holdingZh: Ang Thiam Swee 对《公司法》第216A条的许可门槛作出系统阐释，强调申请人的主观动机本身并非决定性因素，关键在于拟提起的派生诉讼是否真实服务于公司利益，并要求将善意与公司利益两个要件联动审查。
holdingEn: Ang Thiam Swee gave a leading account of the leave threshold under s 216A of the Companies Act, stressing that motive alone is not decisive; the key question is whether the proposed derivative action genuinely serves the company's interests, with good faith and corporate benefit assessed together.
